description: Community-mapped names for Crimson Desert equipment modding. THREE SEPARATE NAMESPACES - same key number means different things! stats = enchant level stats (statusinfo.pabgb), buffs = equipment buffs (buffinfo.pabgb), passives = passive skills (skill.pabgb). Contributions welcome: verify in-game, set verified=true, submit PR.

buffs.name: Fire Resistance
buffs.effect: Burn Immunity / Burn Resistance / Heat Immunity

buffs.name: Ice Resistance
buffs.effect: Freeze Immunity / Freeze Resistance / Cold Immunity

buffs.name: Equipment Drop Rate
